name: Spicy Bean and Biscuit Pot Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups White wine or vegetable broth
1 cup Red and green bell peppers, seeded and diced
12 ounces Canned peeled tomatoes, drained and chopped
2 cups Canned pinto or adzuki beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. Coat an 8- to 10-cup casserole dish with vegetable spray.
3. In a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat, combine white wine or vegetable broth and honey; heat to simmering.
4. Add onions; cook, stirring, for 3 minutes.
5. Add mushrooms, peppers, garlic, chilies, and tomatoes; cook, stirring, for 5 minutes.
6. Add corn, beans, cumin, and chili powder; simmer, uncovered, for 5 minutes.
7. Remove from heat. Pour 1/4 cup cooking liquid into a small bowl; stir in tomato paste and miso until dissolved.
8. Return liquid mixture to the pot and stir until combined.
9. Pour vegetable filling into the casserole dish.
10. Top with Basic Biscuit Crust. Do not seal edges.
11. Bake for 30 minutes. Cover with aluminum foil and bake for an additional 10 minutes. Serves 8.
Per serving: 329 calories; 11 grams protein; 4 grams fat; 51 grams carbohydrate; 8 milligrams cholesterol; 333 milligrams sodium; 7 grams fiber; vegan, vegetarian
Time: 30-40 minutes
